final_choice.row_label: Ferry and other ship operation and maintenance

variables.notes: R:nc. No COGS candidates were provided, and there is no explicit single 'Cost of sales' row. Selected the main direct operating cost buckets that appear to represent service delivery costs. Manual review is needed because the statement format is segment/service-cost based and these may not perfectly align to standard COGS.
